import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  end
  let a = match nums.get(0)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let bb = match nums.get(1)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let s = match nums.get(2)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    1
  end
  mut v = a
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  while v < bb
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    v = v + s
  end
  println(out)
end
